'''鈭歾h-sh-th''' ('''zhashatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pun|pun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pun|pun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-sh-th
|-
! Lemma
| zhashatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhashathithi|zhashathithi]] || [[word:zhashathiji|zhashathiji]] || [[word:zhashathishi|zhashathishi]] || [[word:zhashathi|zhashathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashathuthuth|zhashathuthuth]] || [[word:zhashathujuj|zhashathujuj]] || [[word:zhashathushush|zhashathushush]] || [[word:zhashath|zhashath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashathuthu|zhashathuthu]] || [[word:zhashathuju|zhashathuju]] || [[word:zhashathushu|zhashathushu]] || [[word:zhashathu|zhashathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashathufuth|zhashathufuth]] || [[word:zhashathufuj|zhashathufuj]] || [[word:zhashathufush|zhashathufush]] || [[word:zhashathuf|zhashathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhashathethe|zhashathethe]] || [[word:zhashatheje|zhashatheje]] || [[word:zhashatheshe|zhashatheshe]] || [[word:zhashathe|zhashathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashathothoth|zhashathothoth]] || [[word:zhashathojoj|zhashathojoj]] || [[word:zhashathoshosh|zhashathoshosh]] || [[word:zhashath|zhashath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashathotho|zhashathotho]] || [[word:zhashathojo|zhashathojo]] || [[word:zhashathosho|zhashathosho]] || [[word:zhashatho|zhashatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashathofoth|zhashathofoth]] || [[word:zhashathofoj|zhashathofoj]] || [[word:zhashathofosh|zhashathofosh]] || [[word:zhashathof|zhashathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhashath忙th忙|zhashath忙th忙]] || [[word:zhashath忙j忙|zhashath忙j忙]] || [[word:zhashath忙sh忙|zhashath忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhashath忙|zhashath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashathathath|zhashathathath]] || [[word:zhashathajaj|zhashathajaj]] || [[word:zhashathashash|zhashathashash]] || [[word:zhashath|zhashath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashathatha|zhashathatha]] || [[word:zhashathaja|zhashathaja]] || [[word:zhashathasha|zhashathasha]] || [[word:zhashatha|zhashatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashathafath|zhashathafath]] || [[word:zhashathafaj|zhashathafaj]] || [[word:zhashathafash|zhashathafash]] || [[word:zhashathaf|zhashathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhashathasha|zhashathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhashathasha|gozhashathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhashathasha|gokizhashathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhashathn眉sha|zhashathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhashathnkn眉sha|gozhashathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhashathn眉sha|gokizhashathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhashathsh毛sha|zhashathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhashathnksh毛sha|gozhashathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhashathsh毛sha|gokizhashathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhashathrosha|zhashathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhashathnkrosha|gozhashathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhashathrosha|gokizhashathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashathmusha|zhashathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashathnkmusha|gozhashathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashathmusha|gokizhashathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhashathsherasha|zhashathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhashathnksherasha|gozhashathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhashathsherasha|gokizhashathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhashathngasha|zhashathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhashathnkngasha|gozhashathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhashathngasha|gokizhashathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhashathyasha|zhashathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhashathnkyasha|gozhashathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhashathyasha|gokizhashathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhashathyamasha|zhashathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhashathnkyamasha|gozhashathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhashathyamasha|gokizhashathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhashathn眉sh毛sha|zhashathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhashathnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhashathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhashathn眉sh毛sha|gokizhashathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhashathn眉rosha|zhashathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhashathnkn眉rosha|gozhashathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhashathn眉rosha|gokizhashathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashathn眉musha|zhashathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashathnkn眉musha|gozhashathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashathn眉musha|gokizhashathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhashathsh毛n眉sha|zhashathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhashathnksh毛n眉sha|gozhashathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhashathsh毛n眉sha|gokizhashathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhashathsh毛rosha|zhashathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhashathnksh毛rosha|gozhashathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhashathsh毛rosha|gokizhashathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashathsh毛musha|zhashathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashathnksh毛musha|gozhashathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashathsh毛musha|gokizhashathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhashathron眉sha|zhashathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhashathnkron眉sha|gozhashathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhashathron眉sha|gokizhashathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhashathrosh毛sha|zhashathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhashathnkrosh毛sha|gozhashathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhashathrosh毛sha|gokizhashathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashathromusha|zhashathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashathnkromusha|gozhashathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashathromusha|gokizhashathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhashathmun眉sha|zhashathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhashathnkmun眉sha|gozhashathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhashathmun眉sha|gokizhashathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhashathmush毛sha|zhashathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhashathnkmush毛sha|gozhashathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhashathmush毛sha|gokizhashathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhashathmurosha|zhashathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhashathnkmurosha|gozhashathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhashathmurosha|gokizhashathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhashath|zhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙sh忙th|zh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhashath|hozhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙sh忙th|hozh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhashath|hohozhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙sh忙th|hohozh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhashath|n眉zhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙sh忙th|n眉zh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhashath|n眉n眉zhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙sh忙th|n眉n眉zh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhashath|n茂zhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙sh忙th|n茂zh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhashath|n茂n茂zhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙sh忙th|n茂n茂zh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhashath|luzhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙sh忙th|luzh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhashath|luluzhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙sh忙th|luluzh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhashath|lizhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙sh忙th|lizh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhashath|lilizhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙sh忙th|lilizh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhashath|kozhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙sh忙th|kozh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhashath|kokozhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙sh忙th|kokozh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhashath|kezhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙sh忙th|kezh忙sh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhashath|kekezhashath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙sh忙th|kekezh忙sh忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
